headline: This Nuclear Energy Trend Could Be Bigger Than Investors Think in 2026
summary: Small modular reactors are shaping up to be one of the biggest trends in nuclear power and BWX Technologies is one of the best ways to play it.

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats As Of March 20, 2026
summary: Dividend Aristocrats (NOBL) beat SPY YTD; March pullback offers entry. Recent dividend increases were from CL, GD, LIN, and O. See more here.
